data.title: Soneil Spark unveils new premium AC chargers made in Canada with 5-year warranty. Ideal for residential and commercial use.
data.description: Designed and manufactured in Canada, the new line of residential and commercial Level 2 AC EV chargers by Soneil Spark offers durability, strength, and ease of use. These chargers come with a remarkable five-year warranty, setting an industry standard. The products provide users with maximum power and control, promising reliability. The company, based in Brampton, Ontario, introduced the line on January 15, 2026.

data.title: UOVO expands in Central Texas with acquisition of Vault Fine Art Services, enhancing art storage and logistics.
data.description: Vault Fine Art Services has recently become a part of UOVO's national platform of art storage and logistics providers. The announcement was made in Austin, Texas on January 15, 2026. UOVO, known for its top-notch services in storing and managing fine art, archives, and collectibles, has successfully acquired Vault Fine Art Services. This strategic move aims to enhance UOVO's reach and capabilities in the industry.

data.title: Dan Foster, senior development manager, Chelsea Investment Corp, joins FHLB Dallas' Affordable Housing Advisory Council with 20+ years experience.
data.description: Dan Foster, a senior development manager at Chelsea Investment Corp. in Albuquerque, New Mexico, has been appointed to the Affordable Housing Advisory Council by the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas). With over 20 years of experience in housing and community development, Mr. Foster has held positions in various sectors including nonprofit organizations, state housing finance agencies, public housing authorities, and for-profit development organizations. This appointment reflects FHLB Dallas's commitment to addressing affordable housing needs with diverse expertise.

data.title: Brink's announces quarterly dividend of $0.255 per share, payable on March 2 to shareholders on record as of Feb 2.
data.description: In Richmond, Virginia on January 15, 2026, The Brink’s Company (NYSE: BCO) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.255 per share for its common stock. Shareholders of record on February 2, 2026, will receive the dividend on March 2, 2026.

data.title: Relevant Health in LA aids health brands in growth, handling paid media scrutiny and compliance, launched in 2026.
data.description: In Los Angeles on January 15, 2026, Relevant Health, a comprehensive growth partner specializing in health and wellness brands on a large scale, was introduced. Headquartered in Los Angeles, the firm assists established companies dealing with challenges such as paid media assessment, regulatory compliance, and financial transactions.

data.title: NECA creates Chief Operating Officer and Chief Communications Officer roles - Jef Fagan COO, Marco Giamberardino CCO.
data.description: In a recent announcement, it was revealed that Jef Fagan will be stepping into the role of Chief Operating Officer and Marco Giamberardino will be taking on the responsibilities of Chief Communications Officer for the National Electrical Contractors Association (NECA). The decision was made by the NECA Executive Committee on January 15, 2026. These appointments mark a significant shift at the organization, demonstrating a strategic move towards enhanced leadership. Jef Fagan and Marco Giamberardino's roles will be crucial in driving the association forward, overseeing key operations and communication strategies. This decision showcases NECA's commitment to optimizing its leadership structure for the future.

data.title: NAHQ announced 2026 Board of Directors. Group of healthcare quality leaders to guide organization.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, the National Association for Healthcare Quality® (NAHQ) revealed its 2026 Board of Directors. This board consists of notable healthcare quality and safety experts who will lead the organization in advancing the field further.

data.title: Bankinter invests in Bit2Me's capital structure after €30 million funding round, focusing on tech innovation and EU expansion.
data.description: In an agreement between a bank and Bit2Me, both parties will collaborate to explore technological synergies and opportunities for knowledge-sharing. The bank is emphasizing its dedication to technological innovation with venture capital investments. Bit2Me aims to boost its EU expansion plans with support from the agreement, focusing on accelerating growth.

data.title: Sun Pharma launches UNLOXCYT™ for advanced cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma in the US, for adults not eligible for surgery or radiation.
data.description: A groundbreaking treatment known as UNLOXCYT has been introduced in the United States to help adults with metastatic cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma (mCSCC) or locally advanced CSCC (laCSCC) who are ineligible for curative surgery or curative radiation. UNLOXCYT presents a new approach in checkpoint inhibition, providing hope for individuals facing these advanced stages of CSCC.

data.title: US core CPI inflation remained at 2.6% in December, boosting S&P 500 futures and increasing odds of a Federal Reserve rate cut.
data.description: In December, core CPI inflation remained steady at a modest 2.6%, defying expectations. This led to an increase in S&P 500 futures and raised the likelihood of a Federal Reserve rate cut. The data was described as 'Goldilocks,' indicating a favorable balance for the economy.
